DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MG RESTAURANTS, INC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Housing/Real Property Court, to be heard on May 12, 2014 at 9:30 am and to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. (See Local Rule 8.10.) Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the Cross-Complaint to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 11 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
